---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: "OOH Session #134...<br>[Custom<br>Callouts!!]{.calling  style='font-size:2em;'}"
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: ../../../img/bubble.png
  data-background-opacity: ".7"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://cdn.creazilla.com/cliparts/1996313/cheer-megaphone-clipart-md.png #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
custom-callout:
  todo:
    icon-symbol: "💯"
    color: "white"
  thumbs-up:
    icon-symbol: "fa-jedi"
    color: "#008000"
  eighteen: 
    title: "Adults Only!"
    icon-symbol: "🔞"
    color: "red"
filters: 
  - reveal-header
  - custom-callout
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
+ Recap session #133
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[Custom Callouts!!]{.calling .bigger}](https://github.com/coatless-quarto/custom-callout)
+ Shared problem-solving

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>



:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 170px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/6_9_26">
  <img src="/img/title133.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#133: 

![](https://pngimg.com/uploads/sticky_note/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="100"}

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1b/R_logo.svg/3840px-R_logo.svg.png){.absolute top="305" right="118" height="150"}

## [[Code Appendices]{.glitch .bigger}](https://github.com/cl-roberts/code-appendix)

`knitr` package [function](https://pkg.yihui.org/rmarkdown-cookbook/code-appendix) and [Quarto extension(s)](https://github.com/coatless-quarto/regurgitate)

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Quarto {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="70%"}

1. [install extension]() (from terminal):

```{r}
quarto add cl-roberts/code-appendix
```

2. activate capability within .qmd YAML:

```{r}
---
filters:
    - code-appendix
---
```

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

::: {.callout-note}

Set `echo: true` on chunks you want to be displayed within the Appendix. [`regurgitate` is another option](https://github.com/coatless-quarto/regurgitate) (we didn't test)

:::

:::

:::

### {{< iconify file-icons:rmarkdown style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} Markdown

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

````{r}
# Appendix: All code for this report

```{r ref.label=knitr::all_labels(), echo=TRUE, eval=FALSE}
## Can be empty -- effect is located within chunk specification
```
````

::: {.smaller}

+ Can also use [within Quarto documents](https://github.com/orgs/quarto-dev/discussions/6650#discussioncomment-6861503)
+ Appendix heading **NOT** auto--generated

:::

:::

::: {.column width="35%"}

::: {.callout-note}

Operates independently from individual code chunks (if you don't want duplicate echoing, set individual code chunk options to `echo: false`)

:::

:::

:::

:::

![](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeHg4MmIwZ2VnNTRhMTZvdnA0eHc3aHAwY2JoaWNkdWp5NWc2bXlyOCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/H7f4BTCtRNnYlnANyj/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-140" top="-30" height="300"}

# Today...

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYnlibzF6bXNxMHJxcmZtY3dvbGp3YWl0b3FuOGZjYjR2Z3BsaGVnbiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/YF6ruFN9tmEElUAB6q/giphy.gif)

## [[Custom Callouts!!]{.calling .bigger}](https://github.com/coatless-quarto/custom-callout)^[deeper customization [also possible](https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/bookdown/callouts/#/customized-callouts) -- more flexible but much less convenient]

::: {.columns .Smaller}

::: {.column width="50%"}

::: todo

+ dis...
+ dat...
+ ...& de udder ting

:::

::: {.thumbs-up title="Use the force, Wicket"}
![](https://www.lucasfilm.com/app/uploads/star-wars-ewoks-standard-page-marquee-02.jpg)
:::

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

::: eighteen
Noone under 18 allowed!!

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdDRpZjhzNDE5cDdwdmNrNXQwd2dpYW1oa3g2djIzcHYzejJoczBidCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/fT5iGWCHaBaWQ/giphy.gif)
:::

:::

:::

## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} & {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
sessionInfo()
```
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}

Quarto version `r quarto::quarto_version()`  

:::

:::
